response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the entire video to identify content. The video is a promotional clip featuring VTuber Yuzuki Choco. 
2. Monitored the audio for any vocal music performance. 
3. The background music throughout the video is entirely instrumental. There is no singing at any point in this clip.
4. Concluded that no vocal music is present. Consequently, no searches for song lyrics were required.
5. Structured the video into chronological scenes based on the dialogue and transitions.
6. Generated the JSON output based on the findings.
response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring VTuber Yuzuki Choco discussing her upcoming song "キミの秒針" (Kimi no Byoushin). The video consists entirely of dialogue and a credit sequence accompanied by instrumental background music. No vocal music is performed in this clip.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco introduces herself and begins discussing her new project. Instrumental background music plays.
Yuzuki Choco details the creation of her new song "キミの秒針" (Kimi no Byoushin) and mentions the contributors. Instrumental background music continues.
Promotional announcements regarding the release of the song and associated content, including MV details. Instrumental background music continues.
Credit sequence displays the names of the production team while instrumental background music plays.
Final static image (outro card). No audio.
